description: Signature verifies but bind.nonce does not match the challenge (replay from different session); MUST be rejected with TM_BINDING_FAILED
note: The trust_mark is a legitimate mark that was signed for a different challenge_nonce or aud. Verification of the signature alone succeeds. The binding check (base64url(SHA-256(challenge_nonce || ctx || aud))) does not match bind.nonce, so the mark MUST be rejected.

inputs.trust_mark_jws: <PLACEHOLDER: ES256(payload) signed correctly, but bind.nonce was computed for a different challenge>
